diagrams.title: Three-Level Process Scheduling Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows the three types of schedulers and their placement in the process lifecycle
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how different schedulers work together and their roles in process management

diagrams.title: Context Switch Process Flow

elements: Select Process B from Ready Queue
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the overhead and steps involved in switching CPU between processes

diagrams.title: Scheduling Criteria Relationship
diagrams.description: Shows how different scheduling metrics relate to each other and to process states
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing and remembering formulas for calculating scheduling performance metrics
